title: Pinterest (PINS) Eyes Revenue Boost from tvScientific Acquisition
text: Pinterest announced its agreement to acquire tvScientific, a connected TV performance advertising platform, for approximately $465.1 million, primarily paid in cash. This acquisition is expected to boost revenue by expanding Pinterest's advertising reach beyond its core visual search platform into the connected TV market. tvScientific specializes in connected TV advertising analytics and provides technology for measuring and optimizing TV advertising performance. By acquiring tvScientific, Pinterest gains the capability to serve advertisers seeking performance-based connected TV solutions while integrating this technology into its existing AI advertising systems. The acquisition is expected to provide additive revenue contributions starting in the second quarter of 2026 and ongoing years. Management updated Q1 2026 outlook following the acquisition announcement, projecting revenue of $958-978 million and adjusted EBITDA of $163-183 million, factoring in tvScientific's expected partial-quarter contribution. The strategic move positions Pinterest to capitalize on the growing connected TV advertising market while maintaining its focus on AI-driven ad optimization and performance. Investors view this development as part of Pinterest's broader strategy to diversify revenue streams and enhance its advertising capabilities.
